title: Tender Smoky Chinese Penne Rigate Dim Sum
description: A smoky and juicy Chinese dish featuring penne rigate, kombu cold extract, and Buddhist temple friendly ingredients, served in a dim sum form and cooked in a Dutch oven.
instructions: Preheat the Dutch oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit with a small amount of sesame oil.
Cook the penne rigate according to package instructions until al dente, then set aside.
In the Dutch oven, sauté the grated ginger and minced garlic until fragrant.
Add the smoked tofu and cook until lightly browned on all sides.
Add the kombu cold extract, soy sauce, and cooked penne rigate to the Dutch oven, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Assemble the dim sum by placing a small amount of the penne rigate mixture onto a dim sum wrapper, topping with a slice of scallion, and sealing the wrapper.
Steam the dim sum in the Dutch oven for 5 minutes, or until the wrappers are tender and slightly translucent.
Serve the dim sum hot, garnished with additional scallions and a drizzle of sesame oil.
